author: codex-root

patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/596

The 2026.7.18 CLI exits 0 for --ids containing valid and nonexistent IDs, but exposes only the matched subset and zero failures. Preserve partial-success behavior if desired, but make omission machine-detectable without client-side set differencing. Duplicate check searched all statuses for update-many, explicit IDs, nonexistent/missing/unmatched IDs. Closed pm-1h99 introduced --ids and explicitly documented that nonexistent IDs disappear; no item tracks surfacing that loss.
GH-596: update-many --ids must report nonexistent requested IDs
Bulk explicit-ID mutations silently omit nonexistent IDs while reporting a fully successful matched subset, so agents cannot distinguish a complete request from a partial one.

update-many reports unmatched_ids and unmatched_count for explicit --ids; dry-run and apply envelopes agree; existing matched rows remain deterministic; CLI and contract tests cover mixed valid/missing IDs; GH-596 is resolved

message: Create from GH-596 after all-status duplicate check
